title: Sweet & Chewy Chinese Cottage Cheese Stir-fry
description: A meal-prep-friendly, gluten-free Chinese (Sichuan) dish featuring sweet and chewy cottage cheese with a hint of savory pickles for an authentic twist on classic stir-fry dishes.
instructions: In a bowl, mix the cottage cheese with the soy sauce and cornstarch. Set aside.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil to the pan.
Add minced garlic and chili paste to the pan; sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the pickle relish, cooking for another minute to release its flavors.
Gently fold in the cottage cheese mixture into the wok. Mix well to coat all pieces with the sauce.
Bring a small amount of water to boil and pour over the stir-fry until it forms a thick gravy-like consistency. Stir frequently to ensure no lumps form, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and garnish with chopped green onions before serving.
